meta.name: AI Video Pipeline Blueprint
meta.description: Structured blueprint for a production-grade n8n Airtable-controlled AI video generation pipeline.
notes: This file is a workflow blueprint, not a direct n8n export.
Each workflow block lists the exact node sequence, expected inputs, outputs, payloads, and code node logic references.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Projects Prompt Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Projects table for prompt generation requests.

nodes.name: Normalize Project Input
nodes.purpose: Normalize Airtable fields and infer creative mode.

nodes.name: Build Prompt Builder Payload
nodes.purpose: Compose the LLM brief using video-prompt-builder style shot logic.

nodes.name: LLM - Generate Concept Package
nodes.purpose: Generate structured concept JSON.

nodes.name: Parse Concept JSON
nodes.purpose: Validate concept payload and reject malformed scene arrays.

nodes.name: Build Scene Records
nodes.purpose: Convert concept scenes into Airtable-ready scene records.

nodes.name: Airtable - Create Scenes
nodes.purpose: Bulk create Scene records.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Project Outputs
nodes.purpose: Write generated concept back to the project.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Scene Image Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Scenes table for image generation.

nodes.name: Fetch Scene + Parent Project
nodes.purpose: Get the scene record and project context.

nodes.name: HTTP - Nano Banana Start Frame
nodes.purpose: Generate first frame.

nodes.name: Poll Nano Banana Start Frame
nodes.purpose: Poll until start frame is ready.

nodes.name: HTTP - Nano Banana End Frame
nodes.purpose: Generate last frame.

nodes.name: Poll Nano Banana End Frame
nodes.purpose: Poll until end frame is ready.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Scene Images
nodes.purpose: Persist image URLs and mark image completion.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Scene Video Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Scenes table for video generation.

nodes.name: Build Veo Payload
nodes.purpose: Assemble scene start/end frame and transition instructions.

nodes.name: HTTP - Veo 3.1 Generate
nodes.purpose: Generate scene video clip.

nodes.name: Poll Veo Job
nodes.purpose: Poll until clip is finished.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Scene Video
nodes.purpose: Persist scene video URL.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Scene Voice Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Scenes table for voice generation.

nodes.name: Build ElevenLabs Payload
nodes.purpose: Set Saudi Najdi-inspired voice settings and script.

nodes.name: HTTP - ElevenLabs TTS
nodes.purpose: Create scene voiceover.

nodes.name: Store Voice File
nodes.purpose: Store audio output to local or cloud destination.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Scene Voice
nodes.purpose: Persist voiceover URL.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Scene Music Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Scenes table for music generation.

nodes.name: Build Suno Prompt
nodes.purpose: Merge project music prompt with per-scene cue.

nodes.name: HTTP - Suno Generate
nodes.purpose: Generate scene music variants.

nodes.name: Poll Suno Job
nodes.purpose: Poll until music is ready.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Scene Music
nodes.purpose: Persist music URLs.

nodes.name: Airtable Trigger - Final Render Request
nodes.purpose: Watch Final Outputs table for render requests.

nodes.name: Fetch Project + Scenes
nodes.purpose: Load all scenes and project metadata.

nodes.name: Sort Scenes By Order
nodes.purpose: Validate and sort the scene set before rendering.

nodes.name: Build Render Manifest
nodes.purpose: Create the JSON manifest passed to the local render script.

nodes.name: Execute Local Render Script
nodes.purpose: Run FFmpeg merge/render via helper script.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Final Output
nodes.purpose: Write final video URL and render status.

nodes.name: Router - Platform Target
nodes.purpose: Future routing to social publishers.

nodes.name: Prepare Caption Package
nodes.purpose: Normalize title, caption, hashtags, link tracking.

nodes.name: Future - Publish Platform Nodes
nodes.purpose: Reserved for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn.
